title: elsholtzia polystachya
intro: Elsholtzia polystachya, also known as Vietnamese mint or Thai basil, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Elsholtzia polystachya include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving stress and anxiety. Elsholtzia polystachya can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or added to culinary dishes to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
